description: Auto-emit one Dagster asset per HubSpot CRM object (contacts / companies / deals / tickets / products / line_items + custom objects). StateBackedComponent — discovery cached to disk. Materializing an asset fetches recent records via the CRM Objects API. Workspace-shape peer of hubspot_ingestion.

access_token_env_var.label: Access Token Env Var
access_token_env_var.description: Env var with HubSpot private-app access token.

object_selector.label: Object Selector
object_selector.description: Fivetran-shape selector across standard + custom objects.

page_limit.label: Page Limit
page_limit.description: Records per page for the initial fetch (HubSpot caps at 100).
